title: Directions under Section 35 A read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 – Kanaka Pattana Sahakara Bank Niyamita, Davangere
description: It is hereby notified for information of the public that in exercise of powers vested in it under sub section (1) of Section 35 A read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) vide Directive Ref. No. BLR.DOS.QAG.No.S1362/12-07-248/2025-2026 dated March 11, 2026, has issued certain Directions to Kanaka Pattana Sahakara Bank Niyamita, Davangere (“the bank”), whereby, as from the close of business on March 12, 2026, the bank shall not, without
